title: OHP ENROLLMENT ASSISTANCE - 211info
text: NORTHWEST FAMILY SERVICES OHP ENROLLMENT ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers in-person assistance applying and renewing for the Oregon Health Plan (OHP). 6200 SE King Road Portland, OR 97222 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-4pm Email (503) 546-6377 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 546-6377 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Call for information LANGUAGES: English and Spanish AREA SERVED: Multnomah County SITE HOURS: Tuesday/Thursday 1pm-4pm Services: Navigator Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - WOMEN'S HEALTH PROGRAM HOUSING/SHELTER - CASA ESPERANZA INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - FAMILY SUPPORT INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - PARENT EDUCATION INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - PARENTING INSIDE OUT MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - COUNSELING SERVICES SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - YOUTH ALCOHOL AND DRUG OUTPATIENT TREATMENT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. NORTHWEST FAMILY SERVICES
